scripts.start: docker compose up -d postgres redis php
scripts.migrate: docker compose exec php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate --no-interaction
scripts.migration: docker compose exec php bin/console doctrine:migrations:diff
scripts.fixtures: docker compose exec php bin/console doctrine:fixtures:load --no-interaction
scripts.cache:clear: docker compose exec php bin/console cache:pool:clear --all
scripts.composer: docker compose exec php composer install --no-interaction
